pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile against Java 21 APIs and bytecode version; keeping 1.8 would result in compilation errors or runtime incompatibilities with Java 21 features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin (e.g., 3.1) do not support compiling for Java 21 and will fail to build.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the release configuration in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: While source/target might still work, the release flag is the standard for modern Java versions to ensure consistent API usage and bytecode generation; older plugin versions might not support release for newer JDKs.
